pi_items.source: GCompris official screenshots page (gcompris.net/screenshots-en.html) and Wikipedia
GCompris official screenshots page (gcompris.net/screenshots-en.html) explicitly lists activity under 'Discovery - Arts' category

pi_items.verified_value: Famous architectural landmarks and monuments (châteaux, castles, Eiffel Tower, Taj Mahal, Sydney Opera House, Tower Bridge, Notre-Dame de Paris, Louvre, Nagoya Castle, Pyramids at Giza, etc.) from Wikimedia Commons
pi_items.source: GCompris official screenshots page (gcompris.net/screenshots-en.html) - 'Find the details' activity description and image credits from Wikimedia Commons
Confirmed by both task.json metadata and export_result.sh script which checks this path

privileged_info_summary: The 'Find the details' activity exists in GCompris and is verified. However, the activity's category and target content differ from metadata claims. The activity is located in Discovery > Arts (not Puzzle/Jigsaw), and uses images of famous architectural landmarks and monuments from Wikimedia Commons (such as châteaux, castles, Eiffel Tower, Taj Mahal, Sydney Opera House, Tower Bridge, Notre-Dame de Paris, Louvre, Nagoya Castle, and Pyramids at Giza) rather than famous paintings by Seurat, Van Gogh, or other artists. The expected output path is correctly specified as /home/ga/art_detective_success.png.
